text.tspan: ABSOLUTE CARNAGE
@unhappychoice unleashes a tidal wave of 214 commits, slashing +7127 lines.
JUST IN
@unhappychoice hits 106 commits on Saturday, a record for the week.
SEVEN DAY SPRINT
@unhappychoice pushes 5 dependency PRs, each bumping critical libraries.
REVIEW HERO
@unhappychoice approves 54 PRs, keeping the codebase squeaky clean.
DEPENDENCY OVERLOAD
@unhappychoice bumps 25 packages across 8 repos in 7 days.
NIGHTMARE SUNDAY
@unhappychoice stays up for a midnight commit marathon, 106 commits logged.
CODE CLEANUP
@unhappychoice removes legacy code, decreasing lines by 2222.
DEVOPS STORM
@unhappychoice triggers CI for 8 repos, all passing with flying colors.
